summary: Tests have correct structure (workflow validation + integration through act) but are critically incomplete. Missing dependencies: tests reference `load helpers/act_helper.bash` (defines run_fixture, assert_in_output, project_root) and fixture files in tests/fixtures/{all-ok,one-expired,mixed}/{secrets.txt,params.env}, none of which are provided. Coverage is limited to 3 happy-path scenarios; untested: error handling (missing --config, invalid dates, bad policy_days), argument validation (unknown args, -h/--help), boundary conditions (days_until_expiry=0, =WARNING_DAYS), edge cases (empty config, Windows line endings, JSON escaping, SECRET_NOW env var). No negative test fixtures. Integration tests make hardcoded assertions like '| prod_db | 2026-04-15 | 90 | api,worker | 68 |' which couple to fixture reference dates, and fixture contents themselves are opaque. Would not catch regressions in error paths, argument handling, or boundary logic.
